extract: Phione (Japanese: フィオネ Phione) is a Water-type Mythical Pokémon introduced in Generation IV, though its Mythical status has been contradicted by various official sources. It is not known to evolve into or from any other Pokémon, but can be obtained by breeding Manaphy or another Phione with Ditto. It is a member of the sea guardians with Manaphy.
